title: Blueprint
description: Laynce's Perfect Create modpack. Keeping to the vanilla feel, while introducing the ability to automate almost everything.
body:
Blueprint is a Vanilla+ Minecraft modpack centered around the Create Mod. It includes a wide variety of additions that keep to the vanilla feel, while also introducing new features and ways to automate!

Within this modpack are many new features I thought would bring life to the more repetitive parts of Minecraft. New generation, mechanics, villager rebalancing, storage, and obviously- automation! In addition to the base mod, this modpack also includes addons of its own to further blend machinery with base Minecraft.

I'll try to keep this modpack updated with any new additions I add to the Youtube series.
Keep in mind though, that because this is following along my series, playability for others was not something I was thinking about when putting the modpack together. There are over 220 mods in here, so don't expect it to run smoothly on lower end devices.

There are some mods that cannot be downloaded on Modrinth as well.
If you would like to have as close to an identical pack to myself as possible, make sure to include:
- Patterned Glass
- Light Overlay
- Litematica
- Create Copper and Zinc
